title: Chapter 21
content:
Chapter 21: Chapter 21: You Won’t Be Able Experience The " Help Me Out Stepbro...I’m Stuck."

...

"Time to go back..." Owen had stayed for hours until it was almost dusk, thoroughly enjoying the serenity of the place.

He had already planned to head back late; the chances of Arielle coming out during the day were too slim, so why would he push his luck,

Its better choice to let the head of the turtle out than acting forcefully.

Unfortunately, he hadn’t found any other MILFs besides Morenne after few hours of staying in the lake side, making the afternoon a total bust on that front but he didn’t regret it.

His first day was already fruitful, and that was all that mattered.

Owen believes in the saying that too much food in your plate will be bad, so it’s better to slowly move...and

Just row the boat with enough force...and you will arrived in your destination.

’Im really genius... thinking such philosophical words is really built for me..’ He slowly got up, biting a strand of the stem of a grass.

[....]

If the system got the expression to show...then definitely she’s already cringing to what he thought.

Unfortunately... there’s nothing, saving some of the last dignity Owen have.

"The village is really quiet... how are they supposed to have a happy life when they’re not even going outside?" Owen observed the simple surroundings.

Lanterns lined the path, just enough to illuminate the stone pavement, making it look like one of those clichés in an anime...specifically, those slice-of-life episodes 11 or 12.

Those fireworks date or something... repeative yet not bad...maybe even perfect.

’Well, it’s a good thing... I can execute my plans accordingly, hehe.’ Owen knocked on the door... it was basic courtesy to knock before entering.

"Coming~!" A melodic voice reached his ears... the motherly figure of Arielle was back.

"Oh my... where did you run off to, my dear Wen?" She inspected Owen from every possible angle, looking at him with deep worry.

She had already forgotten what had happened this morning as her mother figure went to work.

"Just some sightseeing. I wandered around the village and enjoyed the relaxing vibes, which are completely different from the city, Mom." Owen entered the house and hugged her touching her ass without hesitation.

"Ughn... you silly boy.." she moaned slightly as she pinched his waist. Getting her ass fondled is not a welcoming she expected.

"Ehehe, my hand slipped, Mom~"

"Hmph... you are getting naughty, my boy." She pinched his cheeks gently, shaking them to emphasize her words... though her body lied as she shifted uncontrollably.

Her body clearly wanted more but to shy to say what she’s feeling.

’Ahnn... I’m really spent from what I did, but I just can’t find that kind of feeling again.’ She was deeply frustrated because she had masturbated for hours but couldn’t find the same level of satisfaction Owen had given her body.

Those gently yet at the same time fierce touch, the whisper’s that made her quiver, making her face flushed tomato red and his cheeky but sincere voice.

As a mother, knowing that is simple as breathing...by just looking at her boy’s action and expression Arielle knows that he was true to his words.

Obviously...what Owen said to him is true, especially those dirty talk ones!

"Hmm... it smells good, Mom. Did you cook something new this time?" Owen sniffed, the aroma making his stomach growl... he hadn’t eaten anything for lunch, so he was starving.

"Oh my... at least you have a good nose." She poked his nose playfully as she retreated, grabbing his arm.

"I cooked something good this time, so you need to eat your fill!" Arielle grab his arm and went straight to the dining room...

As Arielle presented him with another bountiful dish that made his mouth water.

"Then... let’s dig in!" Owen didn’t wait for another session of teasing, as he was truly dead hungry... plus, the system hadn’t issued any quests yet.

...

"Ahh... thank you, Mom, that was really good!" Owen complimented her.

Since they had begun eating, Owen hadn’t stopped teasing her... finding the best opportunities to slowly melt her defenses again.

"Oh my... then I’m glad that you are full." She lifted the dishes, needing to wash them now.

Ding!

[ Help your mother to wash the dish, be a responsible son.]

[ Rewards: MILF Token 2x/ 50 Exp Points ]

[ Failure: You won’t be able experience the " Help me out stepbro...I’m stuck." ]

’How does this system never miss an opportunity?’ Owen’s face twitched... the freaking text for the quest’s failure was way too familiar!

’Ohh, that should be stepson, not stepbro, system keke.’ Owen thought, expecting some feedback, but the system remained completely silent.

"Oh my... I can do it, my dear Owen..." Arielle was surprised to see Owen clearing the remaining plates from the table to clean them up.

"It’s not a big problem, Mom." Owen was already behind her back... giving his "support" as he slowly rubbed his rod against her!

"Oh my... silly boy, don’t press it down like that." She blushed slightly; the rod was just too hard to miss.

It felt incredibly hot against her back.

"I’m just helping you, Mom, you don’t have to worry." Owen slipped his hands over her arms... his fingers brushing against hers while she was cleaning the plates with soap.

"Oh my... i-it’s touching my ass," she said meekly, finally learning to say the word ’ass’ without hesitation.

"What? I don’t recall such a thing touching your ass, Mom... now let me help you out." Owen slowly made his presence felt as he guided her hands.

He didn’t miss the chance to fully enjoy her busty tits pressing against his biceps.

It was completely addicting, so much so that he wanted to pause the washing entirely just to fondle them!

Maybe he could even milk them...

"Ughnn... you silly boy." She had barely recovered from her previous fatigue, and now he was relentlessly rubbing his cock against her back without any restraints.
